name: Financial Reasoning — Numeric
description: FinQA-style numeric financial reasoning benchmark with 11 original items requiring exact computation of growth rates, margins, ratios, and differences from small tables.

items.prompt: Company Vireo Foods reported net revenue of $4,310 million in fiscal 2021 and $4,820 million in fiscal 2022. What was the year-over-year percentage growth in net revenue from 2021 to 2022? Give the answer in percent, rounded to two decimals. End with 'The answer is <number>'.

For the year ended December 31, Nimbus Manufacturing reported total revenue of $12,500 thousand and cost of goods sold of $8,125 thousand. What was the gross profit margin as a percentage of revenue? End with 'The answer is <number>'.
Delta Retail Group posted revenue of $7,800 million and net income of $936 million for the fiscal year. What was the net profit margin, expressed as a percentage? End with 'The answer is <number>'.

At year-end, Harbor Logistics had total current assets of $3,420 thousand and total current liabilities of $1,710 thousand. What was the current ratio (current assets divided by current liabilities)? End with 'The answer is <number>'.

Orion Semiconductors reported operating income of $1,540 million in 2022 and $1,980 million in 2023. By how many millions of dollars did operating income increase from 2022 to 2023? End with 'The answer is <number>'.

Sable Pharmaceuticals earned net income of $2,400 million and had 600 million weighted-average shares outstanding during the year. What was the basic earnings per share (EPS) in dollars? End with 'The answer is <number>'.
On its balance sheet, Cascade Utilities reported total debt of $5,600 million and total shareholders' equity of $8,000 million. What was the debt-to-equity ratio? End with 'The answer is <number>'.

Meridian Corp reported total company revenue of $4,500 million, of which the Cloud segment contributed $1,350 million. What percentage of total revenue came from the Cloud segment? End with 'The answer is <number>'.

Aurora Beverages grew its annual revenue from $1,000 million to $1,728 million over exactly 3 years. What was the compound annual growth rate (CAGR) over this period, expressed as a percentage? End with 'The answer is <number>'.

Fjord Apparel reported cost of goods sold of $9,600 thousand for the year. Its inventory was $1,400 thousand at the beginning of the year and $1,800 thousand at the end of the year. What was the inventory turnover ratio (cost of goods sold divided by average inventory)? End with 'The answer is <number>'.

Titan Industries reported net income of $1,400 million and declared total dividends of $420 million for the fiscal year. What was the dividend payout ratio, expressed as a percentage? End with 'The answer is <number>'.
